skill.summary: Deploy tokens on Solana, trade on pump.fun & Jupiter, earn creator fees

latestVersion.changelog:
Initial release of p0-for-agents ClawHub Skill.

- Deploy tokens on Solana and trade via pump.fun & Jupiter
- Earn and claim creator fees; integrated fee management endpoints
- API key-based authentication with setup instructions
- Batch deployment, project management, trading, alerts, and position endpoints supported
- Free and Pro pricing tiers detailed, including limits and feature access
- Strategy guide included for maximizing agent earnings and token deployment
